name_en: 💖《Includes Full Original Green Box Packaging》💖GG Marmont Series Card Holder. Brand heritage design details are interpreted in new styles every season, writing a new chapter for the brand's long design heritage. This card holder is made of black leather, adorned with the classic Double G motif from the 70s. Black leather, gold-tone hardware, canvas lining Double G, 6 card slots, 1 zip pocket.

Dimensions: 12cm (W) x 8cm (H)

Made in Italy
